BlogAbout

About

Hi and welcome to my website! Some quick facts about me: I am a junior at Harvard College studying computer science and math. I am interested in learning about operating systems and security and hope to pursue a PhD in computer science after graduating. In my free time I love listening to music, playing the piano, and baking.

I will use this website to keep track of various things I learn about (including paper notes, blog posts about tools I learn to use, and fun recipes).
